headline: Prime Day is almost over, but these are still the best Apple deals I’ve seen
summary: Prime Day is in its final hours, with Apple deals still available. Find discounts on wireless earbuds and smartwatches. Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3 remain at best-ever prices.

headline: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: It's the final day of Prime Day, with over 140 deals still available. Discounts cover gadgets like TVs, smart home tech, and headphones. Popular deals are selling out, so act quickly.

headline: 24 Prime Day deals Verge readers are grabbing before Prime Day ends
summary: Discover 24 popular Prime Day deals before the sale concludes. See which products fellow Verge readers are actually buying. Find worthwhile discounts on tested items.

headline: The 17 best robot vacuum deals you can still get before Prime Day ends
summary: Score one of the 17 best robot vacuum deals before Prime Day ends. Significant discounts are available on high-quality robot vacuums. Find offers at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart.

headline: The 65" LG Evo C5 4K OLED TV Drops to the Lowest Price of the Year on the Last Day of Prime Day
summary: The 65" LG Evo C5 4K OLED TV has reached its lowest price. This premium TV deal is available on Prime Day's final day. Amazon saved a top discount for last.

headline: Top Prime Day Deals I'm Shopping Today to Help Beat the Summer Heat
summary: Discover top Prime Day deals to help beat the summer heat. These curated discounts are perfect for staying cool. Last chance to grab seasonal savings.

headline: 7 Best Prime Day TV Deals Under $1,000
summary: Explore 7 Prime Day TV deals available for under $1,000. Find gaming-ready and budget-friendly television options. Grab these significant discounts before Prime Day ends.

headline: These Fantasy Book Nooks Are a Magical Addition to Your Mixed Media Library
summary: Discover magical fantasy book nooks for your collection. Perfect for enhancing any mixed media library. Likely available as a Prime Day special.

headline: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
summary: The US conducted strikes against Iran following a cargo ship attack. Targets included missile and drone storage facilities. Coastal radar positions were also hit.

headline: Mahmood announces new asylum sponsorship route into UK
summary: Home Secretary Mahmood announced a new asylum sponsorship route for the UK. The plan introduces "capped safe and legal" entry options. Aims to restore confidence in the asylum system.

headline: Weekend to bring cooldown after record-breaking heatwave
summary: A record-breaking heatwave is set to conclude this weekend. Cooler and more unsettled weather is expected by Sunday. The shift marks an end to the extreme heat.

headline: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
summary: Earthquakes in Venezuela have claimed 920 lives. Hundreds are still feared trapped under rubble. International rescue teams have arrived to assist.
